description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a vibrant, multi-colored design featuring pastel shades of yellow, pink, blue, green, and brown. The upper is primarily constructed from synthetic or canvas material, with a wavy, layered pattern that wraps around the shoe, giving it a playful, almost melted appearance. The sole is a light brown rubber, providing a sturdy base and contrasting with the colorful upper. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with white laces and eyelets, and the interior is lined with white fabric for comfort. On the heel, there is a small square patch with a logo, adding a subtle branding element. The overall look is modern and artistic, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A colorful, low-top sneaker with a wavy, multi-layered pastel design and a light brown rubber sole. Features standard lacing and a small logo patch on the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wavy pastel layers and the full length of the shoe, highlighting the yellow, pink, blue, and green color transitions.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the heel with a square logo patch and the layered color pattern wrapping around the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the layered design and the smooth transition of colors along the side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing system, and the pastel yellow upper with pink accents.
attribute_logo: square patch on heel, pink with yellow border and design
